---
title: "Oleaceae (Olive family)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->


## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Ash](/trees/species/ash.html) | 3 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Lilac](/trees/species/lilac.html) | 1 | — |
| [Olive](/trees/species/olive.html) | 3 | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
